div.p: States, transitions, and error paths for _scan_string()

g.text: not '"'\\\n, not EOF | accumulate via advance() | IN_STRING_NORMAL
ESCAPE CHAR | INTERPRETED VALUE | NEXT STATE
RULE 1 | advance() is ONLY place position updates — never self.current++
RULE 2 | Error position = token_start_line/col (opening quote), not current
RULE 3 | Lexeme stored RAW: '"hello\\nworld"' kept as 14 chars in source
RULE 4 | Bad escape emits ERROR then CONTINUES scanning for closing '"'
RULE 5 | Newline inside string → ERROR + return (no multi-line literals)
RULE 6 | peek() returns '\0' at EOF — never matches any valid escape char
EMITS | Token(ERROR, ...) on unterminated OR unknown escape
HELPER | advance() — consumes char, updates self.line / self.column
